title: Patch Plan Schema
description: Schema for defining ordered patch plans with enforced constraints on patch types, file limits, diff line limits, and repair loop guardrails. Establishes the vocabulary for WINT-3010 Gatekeeper Sidecar enforcement.

patches.description: Ordered array of patch steps. Convention: types_schema → api → ui → tests → cleanup

PatchType.description: Patch type defining the layer being modified. Enum order communicates intended sequencing convention.

RepairLoop.description: Guardrails for iterative error-fix cycles after a verification_command failure

fix_only_referenced_errors.description: When true, agent may only fix errors explicitly cited in the tool output (line numbers or error codes)

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of fix-rerun cycles before escalating

rerun_command.description: Command to run after each fix attempt (e.g., pnpm lint, pnpm check-types)

PatchStep.description: A single patch step with enforced file and diff limits

description.description: Human-readable description of what this patch step changes

max_files.description: Maximum number of files this patch step may touch

max_diff_lines.description: Maximum total diff lines (additions + deletions) for this patch step

verification_command.description: Optional command to run to verify this patch step (e.g., pnpm build, pnpm test)
